title: Swench Pack
body:
# 🌟 Swench Pack Features

* ✨ No Particles: Removes particles from the game.

* 🛡️ Smaller Totem: Makes the Totem of Undying smaller.

* ⚓ Improved Anchor & Crystals: Enhances the appearance of anchors and end crystals.

* 🏹 Smaller Bows & Swords: Reduces the size of bows and swords.

* 🖥️ Iconic GUIs: Adds symbols to graphical user interfaces (GUIs).

* 👕 Simplified Armors: Makes armor textures more minimalistic.

* 🎯 Better Crosshair: Improves the in-game crosshair.

* 📚 Enchantment Icons: Adds icons to represent different enchantments.

* 🔥 Minimal Fire: Shrinks the fire animation to the bottom of the screen, keeping your view clear.

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/l3pCxVgp/images/d0960e20d0b5019f498c85e3db86ca503c7a513a.png)
